zh.Egremont, Cumberland, England: 英國波藍德艾格雷蒙特
zh.lifeSummary: 當Amabel FitzWilliam Lady of Copeland於大約1131年出生在英國時，她的父親William FitzDuncan Earl of Moray42歲，母親Alice Rumilly17歲。她於1162年之前與Reynold de Lucy結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1201年享年71歲。

zh-hans.Egremont, Cumberland, England: 英国波藍德艾格雷蒙特
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Amabel FitzWilliam Lady of Copeland于大约1131年出生在英国时，她的父亲William FitzDuncan Earl of Moray42岁，母亲Alice Rumilly17岁。她于1162年之前与Reynold de Lucy结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1201年享年71岁。

nameMeanings.name: FitzWilliam
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish (of Norman origin): from Anglo-Norman French fiz ‘son’ (see Fitz ) + the personal name William .

variants.name: Fitz
meanings: English: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (from Latin filius), used originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same personal name and then conventionalized as a hereditary surname, or short for a surname of which fiz ‘son’ was the first element, for example Fitzhenry and Fitzroy .
German: from a vernacular pet form of the personal name Vinzenz (see Vincent ) or Vitus (see Vito , compare Veit ). Compare also Fietz .

nameMeanings.name: Amabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin amabilis ‘lovable’ via Old French. Although now very rare in the English-speaking world, this name lies behind the much commoner name Annabel and also Mabel . It gained some currency from being borne by the character Amabel Rose Adams in Angela Thirkell's Barsetshire Chronicles ( 1933 onwards).

en.lifeSummary: When Amabel FitzWilliam Lady of Copeland was born about 1131, in England, her father, William FitzDuncan Earl of Moray, was 42 and her mother, Alice Rumilly, was 17. She married Reynold de Lucy before 1162. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died in 1201, at the age of 71.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Amabel FitzWilliam Lady of Copeland est née environ 1131, à Angleterre, son père, William FitzDuncan Earl of Moray, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Alice Rumilly, avait 17 ans. Elle a épousé Reynold de Lucy avant 1162. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1201, à l’âge de 71 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Amabel FitzWilliam Lady of Copeland um 1131 in England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William FitzDuncan Earl of Moray 42 und ihre Mutter Alice Rumilly 17. Sie hat vor 1162 Reynold de Lucy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1201 im Alter von 71 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Amabel FitzWilliam Lady of Copeland è nata il circa 1131 nel England, sua padre, William FitzDuncan Earl of Moray, aveva 42 anni e sua madre, Alice Rumilly, aveva 17 anni. Lei sposato Reynold de Lucy prima del 1162. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1201, all'età di 71 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Amabel FitzWilliam Lady of Copelandが約1131年にイギリスで生まれた時，父William FitzDuncan Earl of Morayは42歳，母Alice Rumillyは17歳であった。1162年以前にReynold de Lucyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1201年に71歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Amabel FitzWilliam Lady of Copeland(이)가 대략 1131년 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William FitzDuncan Earl of Moray(은)는 42세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice Rumilly(은)는 17세였다. 그녀는 1162년 이전 Reynold de Lucy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1201년 71세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Amabel FitzWilliam Lady of Copeland nasceu aproximadamente 1131, em Inglaterra, seu pai, William FitzDuncan Earl of Moray, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Alice Rumilly, tinha 17 anos. Ela casou-se com Reynold de Lucy antes 1162. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1201, com 71 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Amabel FitzWilliam Lady of Copeland родилась около 1131 г. в местности Англия, её отцу по имени William FitzDuncan Earl of Moray было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Alice Rumilly, 17. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Reynold de Lucy перед 1162 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1201 г. в возрасте 71 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Amabel FitzWilliam Lady of Copeland nació aproximadamente 1131, en Inglaterra, su papá, William FitzDuncan Earl of Moray, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Alice Rumilly, tenía 17 años. Se casó con Reynold de Lucy antes de 1162. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió en 1201, a la edad de 71 años.
